en.value:
Output 1. Consolidated Social Protection Framework developed.
 
1.1 Form  social protection task teams in the NSC member ministries  (May 2010)
 
1.2  Organize participatory consultative workshop/meeting with stakeholders for the preparation of social protection framework (May – December 2010)
 
1.3 Prepare draft social protection framework (May – July 2010)
 
1.4  Prepare roadmap towards finalizing the social protection framework and get institutional set up for this roadmap in place (August – December 2010)
 
Output 2. Knowledge and skills of the participating agencies in social protection enhanced.
 
2.1 Organize social protection trainings/workshops/seminars (May 2010 – April 2011)
 
2.2 Organize a study tour (second half of 2010)
 
2.3 Initiate  and support community of practice on social protection (May 2010 – April 2011)
 
Output 3. Organizational roles defined to implement social protection framework.
 
3.1 Assess institutional capacity of the agencies involved in social protection schemes implementation
3.2 Review and design institutional options for the implementation of  social protection framework (July 2010 – Feb 2011)
 
Output 4. Financial options for social protection identified.
 
4.1 Analyze costs/expenditure for proposed social protection functions (July – October 2010)
4.2 Prepare cost and expenditure by social protection schemes (July – October 2010)

en.full: TA 7530-NEP: Supporting the Development of a Social Protection Framework

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
